articles.title: Wall Street drops again to close its 5th straight losing week
articles.description:
Most stocks fell, including three out of every four in the S&P 500.

The post Wall Street drops again to close its 5th straight losing week appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wall Street experienced its fifth consecutive week of losses, affecting local investors.
Three out of four S&P 500 stocks declined, indicating broad market weakness.
Boston residents may face economic uncertainty as market downturn impacts local businesses.

articles.title: Tiger Woods arrested at crash scene on suspicion of DUI, sheriff says
articles.description:
Tiger Woods showed signs of impairment and was arrested Friday at the scene of a car crash.

The post Tiger Woods arrested at crash scene on suspicion of DUI, sheriff says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tiger Woods was arrested for DUI at a crash scene on March 27.
Woods showed signs of impairment, raising concerns about public safety.
Local authorities may increase DUI checkpoints following this incident.

articles.title: NBA shares some anti-tanking concepts with owners, AP sources say
articles.description:
The 10 teams that don't make the playoffs and the eight teams that reach the play-in tournament all would be headed to the lottery.

The post NBA shares some anti-tanking concepts with owners, AP sources say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NBA proposes changes to lottery system affecting 18 teams, including Celtics.
Ten non-playoff teams and eight play-in teams would enter the lottery.
Potential impact on Celtics' future draft strategies and roster development.

articles.title: Celtics’ Jaylen Brown (left Achilles tendinitis) out vs. Hawks
articles.description:
Joe Mazzulla said Brown is "day-to-day".

The post Celtics’ Jaylen Brown (left Achilles tendinitis) out vs. Hawks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics' Jaylen Brown will miss the game against the Hawks due to left Achilles tendinitis.
Coach Joe Mazzulla stated Brown is currently considered 'day-to-day' for recovery.
Brown's absence may affect the Celtics' performance in the playoff race.

articles.title: ‘Where does it end?’: Readers react to gas-powered leaf blower bans
articles.description:
After Arlington and Lexington moved to phase out gas-powered leaf blowers, we asked readers where they stand on the bans.

The post ‘Where does it end?’: Readers react to gas-powered leaf blower bans appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Arlington and Lexington are phasing out gas-powered leaf blowers to reduce emissions.
Residents express mixed feelings about the bans in a recent Boston.com survey.
Local landscapers may face challenges adapting to electric alternatives amid the bans.
